name: Honey-Glazed Corn on the Cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stem, leaves and silky fibres from the corn.
2. Cook in a pan of boiling water for 10 minutes or until a kernel of corn can easily be removed from the cob with a fork. Drain the corn and pat dry with absorbent kitchen paper.
3. Whisk together the honey, oil and (if using) garlic.
4. Place the corn on the grill under very hot heat. Turn frequently and brush with more glaze as it cooks until browned and glazed all over.
5. Cook for 1-2 minutes before serving.
